mainQuestTheme: Restoring clean exchange by ending overgiving, false obligation, and unspoken bargains.

hero.atmosphericSubtitle: The bargain cannot hold if your body already knows it is uneven.

questBrief.collapsedPreview: The exchange must be named first.
questBrief.mission: Clarify what is actually being asked before you agree to carry it.
questBrief.fieldPrompt: Find the hidden bargain underneath the request.
questBrief.livePrompt: What are you agreeing to before it is spoken?

fieldBriefing.whatThisQuestIsAbout: This quest begins at the foundation of exchange. Something is being asked, offered, expected, or assumed, and the first task is to identify the terms before energy is committed.
fieldBriefing.whyThisMattersNow: Unclear terms become resentment later. Clean exchange starts before the promise is made.
fieldBriefing.primaryRecognitionTrigger: You say yes before anyone has said what it will cost you.
fieldBriefing.livePrompt: Where is the request still unnamed?

frictionSignals: resenting a bargain you never named
assetsAndFriction.livePrompt: Watch where obligation enters before consent.

groundingEffect.somaticShift: The body stops preparing to carry what has not been clearly requested.
groundingEffect.bodyCheckPrompt: Does your belly stay open, or tighten before you answer?

unlockCondition.questKey: Name the request → ask for the terms → refuse agreement until the exchange is clear
unlockCondition.embodiedSignal: The body feels steadier when the bargain is spoken plainly.
unlockCondition.ritualPrompt: Ask one direct question before offering support.
unlockCondition.alignmentReminder: An unclear request is not a clean agreement.
unlockCondition.livePrompt: Make the hidden terms visible before saying yes.

hero.atmosphericSubtitle: The body knows when the exchange is not yours to carry.

questBrief.mission: Trust the first refusal before guilt turns it into negotiation.
questBrief.fieldPrompt: Notice where your body has already stepped back.
questBrief.livePrompt: Where is your no already present?

fieldBriefing.whatThisQuestIsAbout: This line recognizes when an exchange is not correct without needing a long explanation. The signal is simple, physical, and easy to override when guilt enters.
fieldBriefing.whyThisMattersNow: A delayed no becomes a messy yes. The cleanest boundary is often the first one.
fieldBriefing.primaryRecognitionTrigger: You already know it is a no, then start bargaining with yourself.
fieldBriefing.livePrompt: Where are you negotiating against your first refusal?

assetsAndFriction.questTrap: You explain until your no loses shape.
assetsAndFriction.livePrompt: Watch where explanation weakens the boundary.

groundingEffect.collapsedPreview: Keep the no in the body.
groundingProtocol: keep the chest broad while saying no
groundingEffect.somaticShift: The body stays separate without collapsing into apology.
groundingEffect.bodyCheckPrompt: Can your chest stay open without offering an excuse?

unlockCondition.questKey: Feel the refusal → say it plainly → do not trade it for approval
unlockCondition.embodiedSignal: The body feels clear before the mind starts defending the boundary.
unlockCondition.ritualPrompt: Use one sentence and stop speaking.
unlockCondition.alignmentReminder: A clean no does not need a performance.
unlockCondition.livePrompt: Let the first refusal be enough.

hero.atmosphericSubtitle: The exchange breaks where the terms were never real.

questBrief.mission: Use the breakdown to expose which part of the exchange was false.
questBrief.fieldPrompt: Track what keeps becoming unfair after the agreement begins.
questBrief.livePrompt: What part of the bargain keeps failing?

fieldBriefing.whatThisQuestIsAbout: This line learns exchange through trial, mistake, mismatch, and renegotiation. Agreements can break because the real cost was hidden, underestimated, or ignored.
fieldBriefing.whyThisMattersNow: The friction is not random. It reveals where the exchange was built on unstable terms.
fieldBriefing.primaryRecognitionTrigger: You keep renegotiating after your body already knows the deal is wrong.
fieldBriefing.livePrompt: Where has the same bargain failed more than once?

assetsAndFriction.questTrap: You call it compromise while abandoning the actual cost.
frictionSignals: staying in a bargain that keeps breaking

groundingProtocol: release tension in the lower back
groundingEffect.somaticShift: The body stops scrambling to repair an exchange that is still unfair.
groundingEffect.bodyCheckPrompt: Are your feet grounded, or are you already preparing to concede?

unlockCondition.questKey: Identify the broken term → name the real cost → renegotiate or exit cleanly
unlockCondition.embodiedSignal: The body feels stronger when the real price is spoken.
unlockCondition.ritualPrompt: Say what changed before agreeing to continue.
unlockCondition.alignmentReminder: A bargain that keeps breaking is asking to be rewritten.
unlockCondition.livePrompt: Name the cost before repairing the deal.

hero.atmosphericSubtitle: Support becomes clean when the terms are shared, not assumed.

questBrief.collapsedPreview: The agreement lives inside the group.
questBrief.mission: Make expectations visible so support does not become silent debt.
questBrief.fieldPrompt: Find the group expectation no one is naming.
questBrief.livePrompt: Where is the community running on assumption?

fieldBriefing.whatThisQuestIsAbout: This line manages exchange through relationship, loyalty, team, family, or community. The pressure is not just personal; it comes through shared expectations and group bonds.
fieldBriefing.whyThisMattersNow: Unspoken group duty can look like belonging until it becomes exhaustion.
fieldBriefing.primaryRecognitionTrigger: You keep showing up so no one has to admit what they expect from you.
fieldBriefing.livePrompt: Where is loyalty covering an unspoken contract?

assetsAndFriction.questTrap: You become dependable enough to be quietly overused.
frictionSignals: avoiding the conversation that would rebalance support
assetsAndFriction.livePrompt: Watch where being trusted becomes being used.

groundingEffect.collapsedPreview: Stand inside the group without shrinking.
groundingEffect.somaticShift: The body stays connected without automatically becoming available.
groundingEffect.bodyCheckPrompt: Can you stay connected without stepping into duty?

unlockCondition.questKey: Name the shared expectation → ask who carries what → stop filling the gap alone
unlockCondition.embodiedSignal: The body stays open to people without absorbing the whole burden.
unlockCondition.ritualPrompt: Ask the group to define the responsibility out loud.
unlockCondition.alignmentReminder: Belonging is not proof that the burden is yours.
unlockCondition.livePrompt: Put the expectation into the room.

mainQuestContent.title: Projected Dependability

hero.atmosphericSubtitle: Others trust your strength before checking what it costs you.

questBrief.collapsedPreview: People assume you can carry it.
questBrief.mission: Separate real responsibility from what others project onto your capacity.
questBrief.fieldPrompt: Notice where being capable has become an unpaid contract.
questBrief.livePrompt: Who assumes your strength means yes?

fieldBriefing.whatThisQuestIsAbout: This line is often seen as capable, dependable, or able to carry more. Others may project responsibility onto that strength before asking whether the exchange is clean.
fieldBriefing.whyThisMattersNow: Projected dependability becomes exploitation when capacity is mistaken for consent.
fieldBriefing.primaryRecognitionTrigger: You let them rely on you because correcting the assumption feels harder.
fieldBriefing.livePrompt: Where has your capacity been turned into obligation?

assetsAndFriction.questTrap: You become the reliable one and disappear inside the role.
frictionSignals: staying useful to avoid disappointing people
assetsAndFriction.livePrompt: Watch where praise becomes a leash.

groundingEffect.collapsedPreview: Drop the role from your chest.
groundingProtocol: let the shoulders lower before responding
groundingEffect.somaticShift: The body stops wearing dependability as armor.
groundingEffect.bodyCheckPrompt: Are your shoulders carrying the request before you have accepted it?

unlockCondition.questKey: Notice the projection → state your actual capacity → decline anything outside clean exchange
unlockCondition.embodiedSignal: The body feels less armored when responsibility is chosen, not assigned.
unlockCondition.ritualPrompt: Answer with capacity first, not willingness.
unlockCondition.alignmentReminder: Being able is not the same as being available.
unlockCondition.livePrompt: Tell them what you can actually carry.

driftPattern: staying in the reliable role past consent

hero.atmosphericSubtitle: The work is complete when the body is free to recover.

questBrief.collapsedPreview: The bargain ends when recovery begins.
questBrief.mission: Complete the exchange by returning to rest instead of staying available.
questBrief.fieldPrompt: Notice where you keep serving after the work is done.
questBrief.livePrompt: Where has completion not become rest?

fieldBriefing.collapsedPreview: Rest is part of the exchange.
fieldBriefing.whatThisQuestIsAbout: This line sees the full arc of work, support, duty, and release. The exchange is incomplete if the task ends but the body never gets to recover.
fieldBriefing.whyThisMattersNow: Without rest, every agreement becomes extraction. Completion must include separation from the demand.
fieldBriefing.primaryRecognitionTrigger: You finish the work, then keep yourself available just in case.
fieldBriefing.livePrompt: Where are you still on call after the exchange ended?

assetsAndFriction.questTrap: You mistake continued access for devotion.
frictionSignals: delaying rest until no one needs anything
assetsAndFriction.livePrompt: Watch where service refuses to end.

groundingProtocol: release the back of the neck
groundingEffect.somaticShift: The body exits the contract and returns to itself.
groundingEffect.bodyCheckPrompt: Can your body stop listening for the next request?

unlockCondition.questKey: Complete the task → close the agreement → remove access until recovery happens
unlockCondition.embodiedSignal: The body feels unavailable in a clean and peaceful way.
unlockCondition.ritualPrompt: Mark the work complete and step away from the channel.
unlockCondition.alignmentReminder: Recovery is not a reward; it is part of the bargain.
unlockCondition.livePrompt: Close the loop before offering more.

perkTrees.subtitle: Develop the capacities behind Foundation of Clean Exchange.

nodes.name: Restored Exchange
nodes.description: This path develops the ability to restore clean exchange through foundation of clean exchange.
nodes.effect: Support becomes sustainable when cost, consent, and recovery are included.
nodes.developmentCue: Notice where exchange turns into obligation.
nodes.masteryMarker: You can give, refuse, renegotiate, or rest without collapsing into guilt.

nodes.name: Terms Recognition
nodes.description: You learn to recognize the real terms underneath requests, praise, duty, and support.
nodes.effect: Hidden obligations become visible before they become resentment.
nodes.developmentCue: Identify what is being asked before accepting the role.
nodes.masteryMarker: You can separate request, expectation, capacity, and consent.

nodes.name: Agreement Boundaries
nodes.description: The body learns to stay intact while exchange pressure is present.
nodes.effect: Agreement comes from grounded consent instead of guilt, speed, or role pressure.
nodes.developmentCue: Let the body answer before loyalty, fear, or obligation speaks.
nodes.masteryMarker: You remain physically steady while naming the real boundary.

nodes.name: Exchange Foundation
nodes.description: The relational field becomes cleaner when terms are spoken instead of assumed.
nodes.effect: Support stops turning into silent debt.
nodes.developmentCue: Make the exchange visible before carrying it.
nodes.masteryMarker: Relationships can hold clearer terms without losing connection.

nodes.name: Clean Commitment
nodes.description: The full path matures into sustainable exchange without hidden extraction.
nodes.effect: Giving, receiving, refusing, and resting become part of one clean cycle.
nodes.developmentCue: Complete the exchange by honoring both contribution and recovery.
nodes.masteryMarker: You restore balance before resentment becomes the proof of imbalance.
